title: task
description:
python/src/lichen/radio/sim_client.py:116 - If connect() is called concurrently (overlapping async calls), multiple TCP connections are opened. Each call overwrites self._stream, leaking the previous connection.

Failure scenario: Two tasks call connect() before either completes:
1. Task A: self._stream = await anyio.connect_tcp(...)  # opens connection A
2. Task B: self._stream = await anyio.connect_tcp(...)  # opens connection B, overwrites A
Connection A is now leaked - never closed, consuming OS resources.

Fix: Either guard connect() with a lock to serialize, or check/close any existing stream before opening a new one.
close_reason: Fixed: Added _connect_lock to serialize connect() calls, preventing connection leaks when called concurrently. Early-return if already connected.
